notary_base_url.title: Registry Notary URL
notary_base_url.description: Base URL for the Registry Notary service.

token.title: Bearer Token
token.description: Bearer token for the Registry Notary caller credential.

openfn_request_fingerprint_key.title: OpenFn Request Fingerprint Key
openfn_request_fingerprint_key.description: Local OpenFn helper secret used to HMAC evaluation requests for replay checks. This value is not sent to Registry Notary.

openfn_target_fingerprint_key.title: OpenFn Target Fingerprint Key
openfn_target_fingerprint_key.description: Optional separate local OpenFn helper secret for target_fingerprint audit values. If omitted, the request fingerprint key is reused.
